case_title: BD THAKOR DBA BRISTOL HOTEL et al VS. LISA MCGROW et al

calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff K. Miranda, plaintiff is present and in Pro Per.
Defendants Lisa McGrow and Morgan Janison are present.
Attorney Dennis J. Sinclitico representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of FEB-27-2012 is vacated.
